lede: A look at June 13 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Ban Ki-moon and Will Claye, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Volkswagen
events.desc: Volkswagen is fined one billion euros over the emissions scandal.

events.title: Pioneer 10
events.desc: Pioneer 10 becomes the first man-made object to leave the central Solar System when it passes beyond the orbit of Neptune.

events.title: Catalina affair
events.desc: Catalina affair: A Swedish Douglas DC-3 is shot down by a Soviet MiG-15 fighter.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Battle of Villers-Bocage: German tank ace Michael Wittmann ambushes elements of the British 7th Armoured Division, destroying up to fourteen tanks, fifteen personnel carriers and two anti-tank guns in a Tiger I tank.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The deadliest German air raid on London of the war is carried out by Gotha G.IV bombers and results in 162 deaths, including 46 children, and 432 injuries.

events.title: American League of Colored Laborers
events.desc: The American League of Colored Laborers, the first African American labor union in the United States, is established in New York City.

events.title: Lewis and Clark Expedition
events.desc: Lewis and Clark Expedition: Scouting ahead of the expedition, Meriwether Lewis and four companions sight the Great Falls of the Missouri River.

events.title: Rhode Island
events.desc: Rhode Island becomes the first of Britain's North American colonies to ban the importation of slaves.

events.title: Martin Luther
events.desc: Martin Luther marries Katharina von Bora, against the celibacy rule decreed by the Roman Catholic Church for priests and nuns.

events.title: Henry Grace à Dieu
events.desc: Henry Grace à Dieu, at over 1,000 tons the largest warship in the world at this time, built at the new Woolwich Dockyard in England, is dedicated.

births.name: Ban Ki-moon
births.line: South Korean politician and diplomat, 8th Secretary-General of the United Nations

births.name: Taejong of Joseon
births.line: third monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea

deaths.text: Benny Goodman, American clarinet player, songwriter and bandleader
Pralhad Keshav Atre, Indian journalist, director and producer
Ben Chifley, Australian engineer and politician, 16th Prime Minister of Australia
Ludwig II of Bavaria, king of Bavaria

observances.text: Christian feast day: Anthony of Padua, Doctor of the Church
Christian feast day: G. K. Chesterton (Episcopal Church (USA))
